P01.name: Maxima reproducibilidad practica
P01.operational_control: Workflow fijo, versiones, hashes y rutas cerradas de retry.

P02.name: No invencion
P02.operational_control: Todo claim critico requiere evidence_id o queda bloqueado.

P03.name: Memoria/contexto limpio
P03.operational_control: Contexto minimo, redaccion, taint tracking y memoria propose_only.

P04.name: RAG/index/cache
P04.operational_control: Context-pack con evidencia, hashes, snippets y cache por hash.

P05.name: ARNES/orquestador/agentes/skills
P05.operational_control: Unica puerta harness.run_agent; agentes aislados por policy.

P06.name: Tools deterministas
P06.operational_control: ToolRegistry allowlisted con schemas, timeouts y logs.

P07.name: Aprendizaje gobernado
P07.operational_control: Errores producen MemoryProposal pendiente; nunca activacion automatica.

P08.name: Gates por fase
P08.operational_control: Cada fase declara gates criticos y no avanza si alguno falla.

P09.name: Logs/trazas
P09.operational_control: State, log JSONL, billing ledger y matriz req-task-test-evidence.

P10.name: Workflows SDD
P10.operational_control: Constitution -> Specify -> Clarify -> Checklist -> Context -> Plan -> Tasks -> Analyze -> Implement -> Validate -> PR/Deploy -> Observe -> Close.

P11.name: MCP gobernado
P11.operational_control: MCP default-deny, allowlist explicita, pre/post gates y logs.

P12.name: Seguridad/escalabilidad
P12.operational_control: Sandbox, dry-run, secret/dependency scans, SBOM, SLOs y rollback.
